title: Online Integration
description: Your AI assistant goes beyond calls — it seamlessly integrates with your website to deliver real-time bookings, instant responses, and 24/7 engagement.

list.text: Let your AI handle online bookings and messages automatically.
Turn website visitors into confirmed clients 24/7.
Provide immediate, accurate responses on any platform.
Unify all client communication channels into one system.

keyCapabilities.title: Key Capabilities
keyCapabilities.subtitle: Your AI doesn't just answer the phone — it works online too.

cards.title: Website Booking Script:
cards.description: A simple copy-paste snippet lets clients book straight from your website.

cards.title: Website Chatbot:
cards.description: Seamlessly connect Clients can chat with your AI in real-time, get answers, and make bookings instantly.

cards.title: 24/7 online:
cards.description: Your clients can reach you anytime — and get answers instantly.

cards.title: Phone coverage:
cards.description: 24/7 phone coverage that works as hard as you do. Never send a client to voicemail again.

exampleCard.title: Real-World Example
exampleCard.description: A physiotherapy clinic installs the AI booking script on their website. Clients now book sessions directly online, receive instant confirmations, and chat with the AI for pre-visit questions. Within weeks, the clinic sees a 25% increase in bookings and fewer missed calls — all while staff focus more on care and less on admin.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Online Integration?
points: Turns your website into a fully functional virtual assistant
Reduces manual admin work and missed opportunities
Integrates easily with existing tools and systems
Enhances client satisfaction with instant support

finalCta.heading: Ready to Bring Your AI Online?
finalCta.description: Let your website do more — answer questions, take bookings, and connect clients with your business anytime, anywhere.
